name: Water Supply Connection Calculator
seo_title: Water Supply Pipe Sizing – Diameter DN
seo_description: Water Supply Connection Calculator. Flow rate (L/s), Connection length, Available pressure — get Flow rate (m³/h), Calculated diameter, Normalised DN.
example_label: Calculate pipe diameter for water service connection with 2 L/s flow over 30m.

range_hints.longitud_m: length from red pública to contador/vivienda

result_context: To {caudal_lps} L/s in {longitud_m}m se recomienda pipe of {diametro_mm}mm ({diametro_pulgadas}"). speed of the water: {velocidad_ms} m/s. Pérdida of carga: {perdida_bar} bar.
formula_display: Diámetro = √(4 × flow rate ÷ (Ïâ‚¬ × speed)); speed recomendada: 1-2 m/s
steps: Select commercial: DN40 (40mm) or DN50 (50mm) depending on length
mistakes: Pipe undersized causing excessive pressure drop
Not accounting for future expansion or peak demand
Using incorrect friction loss formula for the pipe material
description: Water supply pipe sizing based on flow rate and pipe length.
desc: Calculate the normalised pipe diameter for supply.
